title: pyrus communis var. lagenaria
intro: Pyrus communis var. lagenaria, also known as the Bur oak pear, is a variety of the common pear tree that produces a unique pear-shaped fruit. The medicinal properties of Pyrus communis var. lagenaria include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this fruit include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The fruit can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also edible when consumed raw.
